response.overview: Addiction doesn’t always look like hunger, it can look like impulse. Strawberry follows a kleptomaniac who steals not out of need, but compulsion, chasing the brief high that follows each act. Caught between thrill and guilt, she begins to unravel her closest relationships in silence. Through parallel moments of intoxication and isolation, the film explores compulsion as both escape and self-sabotage.
response.tagline: Addiction doesn’t always look like hunger, it can look like impulse.
response.title: Strawberry
